title: Forest Farm parity release
description: Established the Forest Farm production application with the current operations platform and product modules.
summary: Established the Forest Farm production application with the current operations platform and product modules.
details: Added secure application sessions, biometric sign-in support, sensitive-module PIN protection, and role-based module access.
Updated dashboard, field operations, fleet, maintenance, inventory, quotes, training, reminders, display boards, analytics, and offline support.
Applied and validated the Forest-safe production schema while removing inherited demo data and customer-specific content.
